authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(155) — Tule River and tributaries (Tulare Co.)
sources.quotedText: (155) Tule River and tributaries (Tulare Co.). Tule River, North Fork (Tulare Co.), only in the North Fork Tule River and all its forks and tributaries above the confluence with Pine Creek (about 50 yards upstream from the Blue Ridge Road bridge, about 12 1/4 miles north of Springville). All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: Sequoia National Forest: Recreation Site — Tule River Canyon
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 246625, "North Fork Tule River", Stream, CA, Tulare Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":246625,"gaz_name":"North Fork Tule River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Tulare"}. Primary (mouth) coordinate per GNIS domestic names file: 36.1380041, -118.8064826 (source/head coordinate: 36.3288335, -118.6834267). Corrects prior file coordinates (-118.70, 36.24), which were an unsourced guess roughly 15 km from the GNIS mouth point.

parameters.note: This special regulation applies only to the North Fork Tule River and all its forks and tributaries above the confluence with Pine Creek, about 50 yards upstream from the Blue Ridge Road bridge, about 12 1/4 miles north of Springville.

regulations.humanSummary: Special regulation applies only above the Pine Creek confluence, about 12 1/4 miles north of Springville
regulations.verbatimText: Tule River, North Fork (Tulare Co.), only in the North Fork Tule River and all its forks and tributaries above the confluence with Pine Creek (about 50 yards upstream from the Blue Ridge Road bridge, about 12 1/4 miles north of Springville).

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used; live or dead bait is prohibited.

regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag limit; possession limit equals one daily bag limit (2) per the general provision at 14 CCR §7.50(a) absent a separately stated possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
